description: Create a chapter divider slide for Trend 2 with the headline 'Capturing the digital dividend' and a large pull-quote over a full-page visual.

header.headline: Capturing the digital dividend
header.sub: While most banks have mastered digital, its focus—more often than not—has been on servicing. Turning even a modest number of digital interactions into opportunities holds immense potential. To do that, banks will need to find ways to have meaningful conversations with customers across digital channels. AI may hold the key.
